worlds.title: Choose a World
worlds.subtitle: Pick where you want to explore
worlds.foundations_desc: Learn about atoms and simple molecules. Ages 8–10.
worlds.core_desc: Build bonds, run reactions, and conserve atoms. Ages 11–14.

mastery.pre_cta_desc_first: 3 questions — see what you already know.
mastery.pre_cta_desc_started: 3 questions — set a baseline to compare against later.
mastery.pre_done_desc: Finish every mission to unlock the post-check.
mastery.post_unlocked_desc_with_pre: Pre: {{correct}}/{{total}} — see how much you've learned.
mastery.post_done_desc: Nice work — that's real chemistry learning.

missions.star_0: Keep trying! You can do it.
missions.star_1: Good start! Try again for more stars.
missions.star_2: Great work! You understand this well.
missions.star_3: Amazing! You are a chemistry star!

game.interaction_hint_touch: Drag an atom to move it. Tap two atoms to bond — tap a bonded pair again to upgrade. Long-press to delete.
game.interaction_hint_mouse: Drag an atom to move it. Click two atoms to bond — click a bonded pair again to upgrade. Right-click to delete.
game.zoom_hint_touch: Pinch to zoom in — see the electrons whirl through the bonds.
game.zoom_hint_mouse: Scroll to zoom in — see the electrons whirl through the bonds.
game.rotate_hint: Turn your phone — easier to see both sides.
game.conserve_atoms_short_after: same atoms on both sides, just regrouped.
game.conserve_atoms_long_pre: place the starting atoms as molecules on the
game.conserve_atoms_long_after: atoms regrouped as products on the
game.build_atom_fail: Build an atom with the right number of particles.
game.count_atoms_success: You placed the right number of each atom!
game.count_atoms_fail: You have {{have}} {{element}} atoms — the target is {{target}}.

feedback.invalid_bond: That bond does not work here. Think about how many electrons each atom needs.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your experience
settings.no_profile: Create a profile to save settings.
settings.privacy_desc: What SparkLab knows about you (and what it doesn't).

dashboard.title: Grown-up Dashboard
dashboard.delete_confirm_text: This will permanently delete all profiles, progress, and settings. This cannot be undone.
dashboard.create_account_intro: Create a parent account to manage profiles and data.
dashboard.signin_intro: Sign in to manage profiles and data.
dashboard.all_local: All data stays on this device. See the
dashboard.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
dashboard.wrong_credentials: That email and password don't match.
dashboard.telemetry_retention: Activity events are stored on this device only and auto-expire after {{days}} days.
dashboard.data_management_desc: Export downloads a JSON copy of all locally stored data. Delete requires re-entering your password.
dashboard.delete_profile_text: This removes their progress, discoveries, badges, mastery results, and saved scenes. Other profiles are not affected. This cannot be undone.
dashboard.no_recent_activity: No activity in the last 7 days.

periodic_table.title: Periodic Table
periodic_table.subtitle: Explore all 118 elements
periodic_table.fact_template: {{name}} has {{protons}} protons and its electron configuration is {{config}}.

lab_hub.master_scientist_msg: You've cleared every mission. Try the sandbox to invent something new.

onboarding.ready_question: Ready to build your first atom? It only takes a minute.
onboarding.coach_empty: Tap the H button up here to add a Hydrogen atom.
onboarding.coach_has_atom: Nice! Now tap Check below to test it.
onboarding.zoom_pinch: Pinch the canvas to see the nucleus and electrons.
onboarding.zoom_scroll: Scroll the canvas to see the nucleus and electrons.

canvas_a11y.atom_navigation: Atom navigation. Use Tab to move between atoms, arrow keys to move the selected atom, Enter to bond to nearest, Delete to remove.

explanation_quiz.intro: One last question for the 3rd star

sandbox.title: Sandbox
sandbox.empty_scene: Your bench is empty — try adding some atoms first.
sandbox.already_saved: Already in your notebook — try something new.
sandbox.unknown_molecule: We don't recognize this molecule yet — keep experimenting!

badges_page.title: Badges
badges_page.summary: {{earned}} of {{total}} earned. Each one celebrates something specific you've done.

notebook_page.subtitle: Every chemistry thing you've made shows up here.
notebook_page.empty_body: Finish a mission and your first sticker lands here.
